speaker: vo
text: Independent bakeries throw out 30 to 40 percent of what they make. The waste is uncertainty, not ignorance.

speaker: vo
text: Sign in with the bakery's tenant slug, email, and password. The interesting part is what comes next.

speaker: vo
text: Sales history loaded — per SKU, per branch, per day. The forecaster trains on this.

speaker: vo
text: LightGBM trees, seven quantile heads. Pure TypeScript inside a Cloudflare Worker.

speaker: vo
text: Today's bake plan — newsvendor-picked from the forecast. Switch branches: same model, different demand shape.

speaker: vo
text: Open a SKU. The quantile band shows where demand is likely to land; the driver bars show why.

speaker: vo
text: Click Ask Gemma why. The question is prefilled and sent to Gemma 4. It calls the forecaster, reads the top drivers, and grounds the answer in the numbers.

speaker: vo
text: At end of day, one photo is enough. Gemma 4 counts what is left.

speaker: vo
text: Gemma 4 counts the display case and suggests markdowns.

speaker: vo
text: Sign out. The session ends, the tokens revoke, and the page returns to sign-in.

speaker: vo
text: Within two months, the model learns the bakery better than the baker remembers it.
